cemaChart.title: CEMA Business Climate Index
cemaChart.subtitle: European Agricultural Machinery Manufacturers
cemaChart.insight: The CEMA Business Climate Index slipped to -20 in June 2026, entering recession territory. Arable equipment is the weakest segment; livestock equipment remains above average.

constructionChart.title: Eurozone Construction PMI
constructionChart.subtitle: S&P Global Purchasing Managers Index
constructionChart.insight: Construction PMI at 43.7 — contraction persists for 4+ years. France steepest decline; housing worst sub-sector. Forecast: ~50.9 by 2027.

flChart.title: Forest & Landscaping Proxy
flChart.subtitle: Husqvarna Group Organic Growth (Forest & Garden)
flChart.insight: Husqvarna (largest listed F&L pure-play) reported 5% organic growth in Q1 2026, recovering from a weak 2024. No dedicated F&L PMI exists; Husqvarna results serve as the best available proxy.
